description_long: This is a vintage-style gramophone record player with a large, flared horn speaker in a gradient of gold and purple hues, mounted on a wooden base. The base is rectangular and features a decorative front panel with a central control knob and two smaller side knobs, all in black and white. The turntable platter is octagonal, dark purple, and occupies a significant portion of the top surface, with a visible spindle at its center. A black tonearm with a white stylus is positioned over the platter, ready to play a record. The overall design is stylized, with clean lines and a matte finish, evoking early 20th-century aesthetics. The object appears solid and well-crafted, suitable as a decorative or functional piece in an urban vintage shop, café, or public park installation.
description: A vintage gramophone record player with a large gold and purple horn, wooden base, and octagonal dark platter, featuring a black tonearm and central control knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large horn, control knobs, and the full octagonal platter with the tonearm resting on it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curve of the horn, the platter, and the tonearm's position over the record.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the horn's attachment, the platter, and the tonearm from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the horn and the platter, with the tonearm visible but no control knobs.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, octagonal in shape, and dark purple in color. It occupies a large portion of the top surface, with a central spindle visible. The platter appears to be made of plastic or painted metal, with a matte finish and no visible grooves or patterns.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, black in color, and extends from the right side of the base over the platter. It is straight, of moderate length, and appears to be made of plastic or metal. The tonearm is resting over the platter, with a visible joint at its base.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small white component attached to the end of the tonearm, appearing as a separate part. It is small, pointed, and likely made of plastic or metal.
attribute_control_knobs: Three control knobs are visible on the front panel: one large central knob and two smaller side knobs. They are round, black with white accents, and made of plastic or painted metal. No visible labels or markings are present.
